creator: les@ikon-ddpress.com
text:
Upon booting the laptop from the boot floppy the computer hangs and will not continue through the boot process.
The laptop is a generic knock-off AMD-300 processor w/ 128mb Ram 4.1gb hd, 13.3 tft monitor, Linksys 10/100 pcmcia nic.

How-To-Repeat: Restart the computer. It happens every time.
